channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Creators who built followings on trust refuse to outsource some tasks to AI: Humans can sense a decoy
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: America turns 250. Its greatest innovation wasn't the car or the computer — it was learning to share risk
item.description: The Declaration of Independence wasn't just a political document. The CEO of a global reinsurance company argues it was a blueprint for risk-sharing.

item.title: Exclusive: The next wave of AI drive-thrus is here—and a16z and Arc think it finally works
item.description: Founded by former Square and Cash App engineers, the startup trains restaurant-specific AI models to handle screaming kids, changing orders, and more.

item.title: Supreme Court gives Trump a major win on tariffs, but he must act on it
item.description: The Supreme Court overturned Trump's IEEPA tariffs, potentially boosting his economic agenda. An exit strategy is now available.
